reliability_notes: Web-verified 2026-03-18 — Socrata platform confirmed at data.richmondgov.com. CSV endpoint: https://data.richmondgov.com/resource/xqn7-jvv2.csv. JSON endpoint: https://data.richmondgov.com/resource/xqn7-jvv2.json. Updated monthly.

Web-verified 2026-03-18 — rva.gov/procurement-services/solicitations confirms OpenGov as the platform. All bids submitted electronically. Forecast list published but no fixed cadence. Portal returns 403 to unauthenticated scraping.

owner: Commonwealth of Virginia / Dept of General Services
reliability_notes: Web-verified 2026-03-18 — Virginia's eProcurement Marketplace confirmed. Supports state agencies and local governments. Vendor registration via Register Now on homepage. RAA and other Richmond regional entities use eVA.

key_fields: vendor_id, W-9, ACH/EDI form, voided check
reliability_notes: Web-verified 2026-03-18 — 2-min session timeout confirmed. Required docs: W-9, ACH/EDI Payment Agreement, voided check or bank document. 3–5 business-day approval. Submissions must go through portal (no email). Registration URL: https://corerpext.richmondgov.com/OA_HTML/OA.jsp?OAHP=POS_GUEST_REG_HP&OAPB=POS_ISP_BRAND&OASF=POS_SUPPREG_REGISTER
Web-verified 2026-03-18 — rva.gov/minority-business confirmed. Portal URL confirmed with TN parameter. Handles MBE/ESB registration and compliance tracking. Also provides workshops and mentoring.

Web-verified 2026-03-18 — Directory confirmed at directory.sbsd.virginia.gov. Search by cert type/codes/city/zip available. No bulk export confirmed — individual search and print only. Contact SBSD at (804) 786-6585 or sbsd@sbsd.virginia.gov to confirm bulk export options.

Web-verified 2026-03-18 — Launched January 2025. 2026 threshold doubled to $500k via ORD. 2024-187. Businesses with $5k–$500k gross receipts pay $30 flat fee. Filing deadline March 1 annually. Portal also at /BPP (case-insensitive).

Web-verified 2026-03-18 — $30 flat fee for first 2 years confirmed. Eligibility: first-time Richmond location. Excludes mergers/acquisitions/franchises/peddlers. Apply via RVA 311 'New Business Incentive Application'. NOTE: URL /finance/bpol-exemption-program returns 404; correct URL is /finance/bpol-exemption.

owner: Virginia Dept of Health / Richmond City Health District
reliability_notes: Web-verified 2026-03-18 — Plan review fee $40; permit application fee $40. Permit application must be submitted at least 30 days before opening (after plan review approval). 7–10 working days for opening inspection. Checklist PDF: https://www.vdh.virginia.gov/content/uploads/sites/119/2023/12/Opening-a-Food-Establishment-Procedures-Checklist-Final-Inspection-Checklist-RCHD.pdf

Web-verified 2026-03-18 — Up to 60-day processing. Posting notice required minimum 10 consecutive days on building front. Newspaper publication required (2 consecutive weeks). 30-day objection window from initial publication. VA Code § 4.1-230: https://law.lis.virginia.gov/vacode/title4.1/chapter2/section4.1-230/. Application PDF: https://www.abc.virginia.gov/library/licenses/pdfs/val/retail-license-application.pdf
